item_tooltip.dissolver_enhanced.crystal_: Nkankan ti nsọnu, Emi ko le ṣe fireemu rẹ…
emc.title: EMC: §6%s
wireless_open.fail: Ko si bulọki itu ti a rii ni radius Àkọsílẹ %d kan!
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.root.des: Gbiyanju Imudara Imudara. Ni pataki, o ṣeun.
advancements.story.place_dissolver.title: Deconstruct Reconstruct
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Kọ ẹkọ idoti. Awọn aje le ko bọsipọ.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.wo: Kọ igi ki o ṣe iwari pe awọn akọọlẹ ṣe, ni otitọ, ni iye inawo.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Kọ awọn okuta iyebiye. Jọwọ jẹ onirẹlẹ ni iwaju okuta okuta.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ex: Kọ ẹkọ ohun kan lati ita orukọ orukọ Minecraft.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Kọ kobblestone. Bakan, eyi tun jẹ idoko-owo.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.st: Kọ ẹkọ igi kan. Odi Street n wo.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ro: Kọ ẹkọ ẹran ti o bajẹ. O ni iye, ṣugbọn ni iye owo wo?
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.eg: Kọ ẹkọ ẹyin kan. Ojo iwaju jẹ okeene omelet-sókè.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.em: Kọ ẹkọ emeralds. Awọn ara abule yoo fẹ ọrọ kan.
Mu 1,000 EMC. Idọti ti bẹrẹ lati bọwọ fun ọ.
Mu 1,000,000 EMC. Awọn aje ni bayi okeene ohun ọṣọ.
Mu 1,000,000,000 EMC. Jọwọ da idiyele idiyele awọn ọjọ iwaju okuta cobblestone duro.
Mu 1,000,000,000,000 EMC. Ni aaye yii agbaye jẹ gbese ti o yipada.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ta: Kọ ẹkọ 100 awọn nkan. Iranti wa ni o kan ṣeto hoarding.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ho: Kọ ẹkọ awọn nkan 500. Boya eto kan wa nibi.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ev: Kọ ẹkọ awọn nkan 1,000. Katalogi ti di ọja naa.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Kọ gbogbo awọ awọ. Iwe kaunti naa ti jẹ ajọdun bayi.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.dr: Kọ ẹkọ Ẹyin Dragoni naa. Ipari ti ni nkan.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.orbi: Ṣẹda EMC Orb akọkọ rẹ. Ile-ifowopamọ ti yika bayi.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.roun: Fi EMC Orb sinu itusilẹ. Orb naa ti pari awọn iwe kikọ rẹ.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.cond: Ṣẹda EMC Orb kan ti o tọsi o kere ju 1,000 EMC. Ni irọrun ti iyipo.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.heav: Ṣẹda EMC Orb kan ti o tọsi o kere ju 1,000,000 EMC. Jọwọ gbe soke pẹlu awọn ẽkun rẹ.
command.feedback.get.not_found: Ko le wa ẹrọ orin kan pẹlu orukọ '%s'!
command.feedback.memory.fill: Ti o ti fipamọ gbogbo awọn ohun kan!
command.feedback.memory.forget: Gbagbe gbogbo awọn nkan ti o ti fipamọ lailai!
command.feedback.memory.add.fail: Eyi ti wa ni ipamọ tẹlẹ!
command.feedback.player.not_found: Ko le wa ẹrọ orin kan pẹlu orukọ '%s'!
command.feedback.shared_data: EMC aladani ko wa ni titan!
